sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null THEN 'Not Managed' else `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END)  AS Manager,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND
    (Manager = $Manager)
    AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = $Site)
    AND (PrimaryCapability = $PrimaryCapability)

SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
    AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = $Site)
    AND (PrimaryCapability = $PrimaryCapability) AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` != 'Deployed')

panels.title: Asset Details - (Asset Distribution at Non-active Sites)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND
    (`AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` = $Manager) AND
    (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) = $Age

SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Total Physical Memory`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'NA'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 90'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 60'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 90'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
AND (   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` IN ('In Inventory')
)
    AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = $Site)
    AND (PrimaryCapability = $PrimaryCapability)

SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Total Physical Memory`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null then 'Not Managed' else `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END) AS mgrname,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'NA'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 90'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 60'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'NA'
      ELSE 'Over 90'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
AND (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus` IN ('Reserved', 'Deployed')
)
AND (`AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Form Type` = 'People')
    AND (`AST:BaseElement`.`Building` = $Site)
    AND (PrimaryCapability = $PrimaryCapability)

panels.title: Asset Details - (Spare Asset Distribution per Site)

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Total Physical Memory`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null then 'Not Managed' else `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END) AS mgrname,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END),
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END) AS Age3,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND
    (mgrname = $Manager)
    AND (Age3 = $Age)

SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Name` AS AssetName,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`AssetLifecycleStatus`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` is null then 'No Site' else `AST:BaseElement`.`Building` END) ,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Primary Capability` AS PrimaryCapability,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Total Physical Memory`,
   (CASE WHEN `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` is null then 'Not Managed' else `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`Full Name` END) AS mgrname,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Create Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age5,
   DATEDIFF('day', currentDate(), `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`ReturnDate`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) < 30 THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 60 days'
   END),
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Installation Date`,
   (CASE
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) IS NULL THEN 'Never Scanned'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 0
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) < 30
      ) THEN 'Under 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) >= 30
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 60
      ) THEN 'Over 30 days'
      WHEN (
         DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) > 60
         AND DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= 90
      ) THEN 'Over 60 days'
      WHEN DATEDIFF('day', `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`, currentDate()) <= -1 THEN 'Unknown'
      ELSE 'Over 90 days'
   END) AS Age,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`LastScanDate`,
   `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Purchase Date`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
  `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:ComputerSystem`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ComputerSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_ManagedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Managed by'
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:AssetPeople` AS `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`AssetInstanceId`
)
AND (
   `AST:ASSETPEOPLE_SupportedBy`.`PersonRole` = 'Supported by'
)
WHERE ( `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET') AND
    (mgrname = $Manager)
    AND (Age5 = $Age)

panels.description: Shows the number of outdated operating systems by hosts in a tabular format.

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Name`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicenseType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicensesAvailable`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`PatchNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ProductType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSLanguage`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSProductSuite`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` AS OSType,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ServicePack`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SuiteMask`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SystemDirectory`,
   (COUNT(`AST:BaseElement`.`Instance Id`)) AS count,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Class Id`
FROM `AR System Schema`.`AST:BaseElement`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`AST:OperatingSystem`
ON (
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Data Set Id`
   AND `AST:BaseElement`.`Reconciliation Identity` = `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`
)
WHERE 
(`AST:BaseElement`.`Data Set Id` = 'BMC.ASSET')
AND (
    `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date` < currentDate()
    AND `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType` IS NOT NULL
)
AND OSType = $ostype
GROUP BY 
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ServicePack`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicensesAvailable`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`ProductType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSProductSuite`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`LicenseType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`BuildNumber`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`PatchNumber`,
   `AST:BaseElement`.`Disposal Date`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SuiteMask`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Name`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSType`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`OSLanguage`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`SystemDirectory`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Reconciliation Identity`,
   `AST:OperatingSystem`.`Class Id`

panels.title: Hosts with Outdated Operating Systems at Risk (Table)
